Project notes:
- Implemented DocWatch with FastAPI, APScheduler, Docker SDK, SQLite, Jinja2 template UI, AI summarizer abstraction, and notifier channels.
- Added Docker runtime files for compose-based deployment.
- Added environment variable documentation in .env.example.
- No VS Code extensions required for this workspace setup.
